LLVM API Documentation

Here is a list of all macros with links to the files they belong to:

- u -

  • UNI_MAX_BMP : ConvertUTF.h
  • UNI_MAX_LEGAL_UTF32 : ConvertUTF.h
  • UNI_MAX_UTF16 : ConvertUTF.h

  • UNI_SUR_HIGH_START : ConvertUTF.c
  • UNI_SUR_LOW_END : ConvertUTF.c
